use_cases: Two-factor authentication via one-time password entry
Secure user sign-in flow with verification code
Account verification during onboarding or checkout
ai_summary: A secure one-time password (OTP) sign-in card component with integrated button variants for authentication flows. Features a clean, accessible design with keyboard navigation support and hover states, built using Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS for consistent styling across desktop and mobile platforms.
